link.expired: Expired — client can be linked to another CTV
link.portalEligible: Link expired — this client can be linked to another CTV

home.subtitle: Your referral commission across Dental & Aesthetic
home.recentActivityHint: Each row is one commission — the colored badge shows the source (your client, service card, or downline).
home.recentActivityProvenanceHint: Tap a row to open the client (Tracking) or the downline CTV (Referrals/QR).

me.copyCodeHint: Share this link to recruit CTVs — whoever opens it signs up under you.
me.profileHelp: This name appears in your CTV portal and greeting.
me.passwordHelp: Change the password for your CTV login.
me.passwordMin: New password must be at least 6 characters.

network.focusHint: This downline CTV was attached on the client's service card; you earn the upline override.

tracking.focusHint: Card flipped to show the service under this client.
tracking.focusMissingClient: This client is not on your card-linked tracking list. You may still have commission history on Home.
tracking.commissionHistoryOnly: Commission history only — this client is not on your operational cards.
tracking.navigateUnavailable: Could not open tracking for this row — no client could be matched.

title: Operational card tracking
subtitle: Clients on your appointment or service cards — commission requires service card CTV (6-month window)

referralQr.pageSubtitle: Track your CTV network or share discount QR codes with friends

qrDiscount.scanAtDesk: Staff scan at the desk to verify
qrDiscount.tierHint: Shown from your LIVE/OFF status. The % is locked on the code when a friend claims it.
qrDiscount.modeLinkBody: Send the link to a friend. When they open it and claim a code, the discount % is locked on that code.
qrDiscount.modeQrBody: Client shows the voucher QR. Staff scan with their phone → sign in as staff → enter client phone → verify the code.
qrDiscount.generateHint: Each tap creates a new code (one code = one voucher image).
qrDiscount.generateError: Could not generate a discount code. Please try again.

codeHistory.title: My codes
codeHistory.subtitle: Track every code you issued — KOL dashboard parity
codeHistory.empty: No codes yet — share your link or download a QR voucher.

discountLanding.title: Offer from {{name}}
discountLanding.claimBody: Tap below to claim your personal discount code — one code per visitor.
discountLanding.instructions: Show this code or QR at the front desk to redeem the offer.
discountLanding.generateError: Could not generate a code. Please try again.

hierarchy.title: CTV Referral Hierarchy
hierarchy.subtitle: See the CTVs above and below you in the referral tree
hierarchy.noUplineBody: You are currently at the top of your CTV branch.
hierarchy.noDownlineBody: CTVs you invite will appear here after their account is linked to you.
hierarchy.errorBody: Please try again in a few minutes.
hierarchy.searchPlaceholder: Search downline by name or phone
hierarchy.noEarningSource: No downline has generated commission yet

errorBody: Please try again in a few minutes.
emptyBody: Clients appear here when your CTV is on their appointment or service card.
noSearchBody: Try a different search or filter.

join.title: Become a CTV Partner
join.subtitle: Required: name, phone, and password. Email is optional.
join.uplineManualHint: Enter your referrer's CTV phone at the bottom of the form if you need to choose an upline.
join.successBody: You can sign in with the phone or email you just registered.
join.invalidLink: Invalid referral link. Enter a referrer CTV phone number to continue.
join.uplineHintFromLink: Leave blank to use the CTV from your referral link.
join.uplineHintRoot: Optional — leave blank to register as a root-level CTV.
join.uplineHintRequired: Required when signing up from the landing page CTV button.

errors.uplineRequired: Please enter your referrer CTV phone number.
errors.uplineVerifying: Please wait while we verify the referrer CTV phone.
errors.uplineNotFound: No CTV found for this phone number.

card.servicesUnderReferral: Your commission lines for this client
card.emptyBack: No commission lines for this client on your cards yet.
card.tapToReturn: Tap to return to the client tracking journey
